tables.title: Common Adult Toxidromes
rows: Respiratory depression, pinpoint pupils, altered mental status
Agitation, tachycardia, hypertension, diaphoresis, dilated pupils
Altered mental status, dilated pupils, dry flushed skin, tachycardia, urinary retention
Excessive secretions (salivation, lacrimation, urination, defecation, GI upset), bradycardia, muscle twitching

tables.title: Heat Illness Spectrum
rows: Aggressive cooling, rapid transport — sweating does not exclude

tables.title: Hypothermia Spectrum
rows: Cardiac arrhythmia and arrest; handle gently
